{{Quote|Go get me another toy.|Baritha|<ref name="Agents of Deception">{{SWGTCG|set=Agents of Deception|cardname=Baritha}}</ref>}}
'''Baritha''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Dathomirian/Legends|Dathomirian]] who was one of the founding members of the [[Nightsisters/Legends|Nightsisters]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Dathomir/Legends|Dathomir]] and served as leader [[Gethzerion]]'s right hand until the Nightsisters were defeated by the [[Singing Mountain Clan]].

==Biography==
Baritha was exiled from Dathomir's Singing Mountain Clan along with Gethzerion after the pair attempted to assassinate the Clan mother, [[Augwynne Djo|Augwynne]]. While traveling Dathomir, the outcasts met a small group of former clan sisters who tried to kill them. The exiles defeated them, but spared one's life in return for a pledge of servitude. This was the beginning of the Nightsisters.<ref name="CTD" />
[[File:Nightsister_SWGTCG-AoD.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Nightsister Baritha.]]
Baritha was in the [[Nightsister Stronghold]] on Dathomir during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], during which she recruited an explorer to help deliver two Imperial officers to her for her own amusement, and then capture a reformed Nightsister.<ref name="SWG:Baritha" />

Four years after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] arrived on Dathomir. Baritha used a mind trick on Solo, attempting to have him divulge the location of the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']].<ref name="TCoPL" /> She said that he looked "tasty" from behind, and even tried to claim him as her slave.<ref name="CSWE" /> Soon after, Baritha was presumed killed during the [[Battle of Dathomir (Hunt for Zsinj)|Battle of Dathomir]], though some members of [[New Republic Intelligence Service|New Republic Intelligence]] believe otherwise, since her body was never found.<ref name="CTD" />

Baritha was also [[Damaya]]'s aunt.<ref name="TCoPL" />

==Behind the scenes==
Baritha first appeared in the [[1994]] novel ''[[The Courtship of Princess Leia]]'', written by [[Dave Wolverton]].<ref name="TCoPL" /> She later appeared as a [[Wikipedia:Non-player character|non-player character]] in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:Baritha" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> Baritha was one of the quest givers of the original "[[W:c:swg:Singing Mountain Clan Theme Park|Singing Mountain Clan Theme Park]]."<ref name="SWG:Baritha" /> This quest series was removed from the game upon the release of the revamped "[[W:c:swg:Witches of Dathomir Theme Park|Witches of Dathomir Theme Park]]," introduced in the [[W:c:swg:Game Update 19|Game Update 19]] on [[December 14]], [[2010]].<ref name="GU19">{{SonyForumsCite|url=swg/posts/list.m?topic_id=1160720|text=''Star Wars'' Galaxies: Game Update 19}}</ref>
